objective: Implement V2.3 public GitHub source runtime and make public repositories the primary path
tests_run: python -c "import json, pathlib; [print('OK ' + str(p)) for p in pathlib.Path('specs').glob('*.json') if json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) is not None]"
done_criteria: Public GitHub source runtime can clone/fetch public repositories
Public repositories are the primary documented and tested path
Private repositories remain an explicit optional/authenticated path
Relevant tests and contract checks pass
